subtitle: Personalized tips to optimize your recovery
suggest_lower_body: 💡 Consider reducing lower body volume this week
suggest_global_volume: 💡 Consider reducing overall volume this week
suggest_high_stress: 💡 High stress — Prefer moderate RPE exercises and active recovery
suggest_poor_sleep: 💡 Poor sleep — Reduce volume and monitor intra-session fatigue
suggest_high_soreness: 💡 Significant soreness — Adjust warm-up and volume for affected areas
